description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a slim build, wearing a cropped top and fitted leggings adorned with abstract patterns and gradients. The individual sports a dramatic wolf or cat-eared hooded mask that covers the upper face, adding a fantasy or urban cosplay element. Both arms are decorated with spiked bracers, and there are several straps and belts with pouches and accessories hanging from the waist and thighs. The figure wears casual sneakers and has long, straight hair flowing from beneath the hood. The overall appearance is a blend of urban streetwear and fantasy costume, with a focus on unique accessories and layered details.
description: A slim adult wearing a fantasy-inspired hooded mask, cropped top, fitted leggings, spiked bracers, and sneakers, accessorized with belts and pouches.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded mask, cropped top, spiked bracers, and detailed accessories on the waist and thighs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the long hair, and the layered belts and pouches.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the hood, the long hair, and the fitted nature of the top and leggings.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the side profile of the mask, arm bracers, and the arrangement of accessories and pouches.
attribute_clothing_type: urban fantasy cropped top and fitted leggings with spiked bracers, hooded animal-eared mask, and layered belts with accessories
